title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・ゴールはまだ先

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: That was so exciting to watch!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Thanks for such a great race!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
In return, I'll continue to show you the best races
ever!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad everyone enjoyed the race. It looks
like they had a great time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it was amazing for me too! I finally got to
compete with you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's keep helping each other improve... as rivals!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay! But I won't be losing next time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Grass and Spe are both getting so strong!
choice_data_list: But we're not about to lose either!
But we're not about to lose either!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I've still got way more running left in me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep showing everyone that we're the most
worthy challenge!
